title: Is God Anti-gay?: And Other Questions About Homosexuality, the Bible, and Same-Sex Attraction (Questions Christians Ask)
author: Sam Allberry
targetAudience: Christians seeking to understand homosexuality from a biblical perspective
relatedBooks: God and the Gay Christian by Matthew Vines
The Bible and Homosexuality by Michael L. Brown
Washed and Waiting by Wesley Hill
keyInsights: Explores the relationship between faith and sexual orientation
Addresses common questions and misconceptions about homosexuality in Christianity
Encourages compassion and understanding towards LGBTQ+ individuals
